use_cases: User authentication forms with email/password inputs
Contact forms and signup flows in SaaS applications
Data entry interfaces in fintech dashboards
Settings and profile forms in e-commerce platforms
Search inputs and filters in web applications
ai_summary: A flexible labeled input component featuring customizable focus ring colors, password visibility toggle, and dark mode support. Built with Tailwind CSS and React, it provides a polished user experience for text inputs across forms and authentication flows.
